name: @primitive-bench/mcp
description: MCP server for Primitive Bench — query per-slice, CI-backed infra-primitive leaderboards.

scripts.gen:types: json2ts -i types/bench-report.schema.json -o types/bench-report.d.ts --additionalProperties false --bannerComment "/* GENERATED from bench-report.schema.json by 'bench results schema' + json2ts. Do not edit. */"
scripts.check:types: npm run gen:types && git diff --exit-code types/bench-report.d.ts
